candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A particle continuously moves in a circular path at constant speed in a counterclockwise direction. Consider a time interval during which the particle moves along this circular path from point P to point Q. Point Q is exactly half-way around the circle from Point P. What is the direction of the average velocity during this time interval?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个粒子以恒定速率沿逆时针方向在圆周上连续运动。在一个给定的时间间隔内,该粒子从点 P 移动到点 Q,其轨迹为圆周的一半圆弧。
metadata.explanation_zh: 位移是向左的。平均速度与位移成正比,但由于运动方向与位移方向相反,因此要加负号。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question is complete and the expected answer is clear. The image is needed to determine the spatial placement of P and Q, and the diagram clearly shows P on the right and Q on the left of the circle, making the average-velocity direction understandable as leftward.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
